content:
💡 mcp-server | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as a bridge for AI assistants to access and query real-time and historical financial market data through a standardized MCP interface.
✨ Key Features: • Provides access to income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements. • Enables retrieval of current and historical stock prices. • Fetches company news and available crypto tickers. • Supports historical cryptocurrency price data.
📖 Summary: This Python repository provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes financial data from Financial Datasets. It allows AI assistants like Claude to access and retrieve various financial statements, stock prices, and company news through a defined interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
